recommendations.title: Don't. Get. Out!
recommendations.overview: Taking his kids to school with the car, Berlin real estate developer Karl gets a call from a blackmailer: If he doesn’t pay up, the car will blow up. A deadly race against time begins.

recommendations.title: Retribution
recommendations.overview: When a mysterious caller plants a bomb under his car seat, a bank executive begins a high-speed chase across the city to complete a specific series of tasks — all with his kids trapped in the back seat.

recommendations.title: Blown Away
recommendations.overview: After her mother is killed by a car bomb, a 17-year-old girl lives a reckless and decadent lifestyle. She begins having sex with a boy who works at a local ski resort. He falls in love, and she tells him of her suspicions that her strict father was r

recommendations.title: Vanishing Point
recommendations.overview: Kowalski works for a car delivery service, and takes delivery of a 1970 Dodge Challenger to drive from Colorado to San Francisco. Shortly after pickup, he takes a bet to get the car there in less than 15 hours.

recommendations.title: Hard Hit
recommendations.overview: On his way to work, a bank manager receives an anonymous call claiming there's a bomb under his car seat, and if anyone exits the car, it will explode unless he can pay a ransom.

recommendations.title: Bang Bang You're Dead
recommendations.overview: A troubled and bullied high school student fights against judgement from his community after threatening to bomb the football team.

recommendations.title: Coherence
recommendations.overview: Four couples gather for dinner the night a mysterious and powerful comet passes overhead.

recommendations.title: Concussion
recommendations.overview: After a blow to the head, Abby decides she can't do it anymore. Her life just can't be only about the house, the kids and the wife. She needs more: she needs to be Eleanor.

recommendations.title: La Grande Bouffe
recommendations.overview: Four friends gather at a villa with the intention of eating themselves to death.

recommendations.title: Cannibal
recommendations.overview: Carlos is a respectable man, the most prestigious tailor in Granada, Spain. His life is reduced to work and his main hobby is eating; but not just anything.
